news-global-econ.description: Indian companies, meanwhile, are looking to Chile, which boasts the world’s biggest copper reserves, to secure supply, integrate upstream and stay competitive in a tightening global market

news-global-econ.title: Blanche torches Trump foe Boasberg after appeals court blocks judge again in deportation fight
news-global-econ.description: Acting AG Todd Blanche accuses Judge Boasberg of targeting DOJ attorneys after an appeals court again rebuked his contempt probe in a deportation case.

news-global-econ.title: No One Voted For This! Socialist Spain Starts Process to Provide Amnesty to Illegals
news-global-econ.description:
The governing Council of Ministers in Spain approved on Tuesday the Royal Decree allowing for the mass amnesty programme for illegal migrants put forward by Socialist Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez earlier this year.

news-global-econ.title: Trump Tells Britain Drill Baby Drill! 'Europe Is Desperate For Energy', Fortune to be Made
news-global-econ.description:
The UK continues to stumble through a crippling years-long energy crisis that is rapidly deindustrialising the country.

news-global-econ.title: Crime is falling, officials say — victims claim reporting isn’t worth it
news-global-econ.description: City leaders tout falling property crime rates, but federal survey data shows most victims never report to police, raising questions about the narrative.

news-global-soc.title: Stop calling this brinkmanship. Trump's Hormuz move is the real pressure
news-global-soc.description: President Trump's naval blockade cutting off Iran's oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz is the only play left after failed Islamabad negotiations.

news-global-soc.title: Memory chip crunch and Iran war lead phone market decline, IDC says
news-global-soc.description: Global smartphone market declines 4.1% amid memory chip shortages and Iran war, with only Apple and Samsung showing growth.

news-global-soc.title: Gold Holds Gain as Renewed Push for US-Iran Talks Eases Risks
news-global-soc.description: A recent retreat in energy prices has relieved some of the inflationary pressure that has weighed on bullion since the war began more than six weeks ago
